What We Do

SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built on Grit & Reliability

Founded in 2012, Horizon Demolition started with two trucks and a commitment to doing tough jobs the right way. We've grown by earning trust—one controlled collapse at a time.

Our crews train weekly on Houston-specific challenges: humidity-warped structures, flood-damaged foundations, and the unique layouts of mid-century ranch homes. We don't just tear down—we strategize.

When Hurricane Harvey hit, we volunteered demo crews for emergency structural removals. That's how we operate—as part of this community.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Demolition

Local Knowledge

We know Houston's soil types, flood zones, and permit requirements—critical for efficient demolitions.

No Hidden Costs

Fixed-price quotes include debris hauling and site grading—standard on every project.

Precision Equipment

Low-height excavators for tight suburban lots, dust suppression systems for urban tear-downs.

Same-Day Debris Removal

Our fleet of dump trucks means no waiting—we clear sites completely within 24 hours.

Need Space Cleared?

Get a same-day quote for your demolition project. Call 555-DEM-R90 now.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-dem-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Horizon demolished our 1962 Meyerland ranch home to make way for new construction. They salvaged the original oak flooring for reuse and handled all the flood zone paperwork. Crew worked 6am-3pm to beat the summer heat—professional start to finish.

James T. Residential Demolition
“

Our Katy backyard looks brand new after pool removal. They crushed the gunite onsite and regraded properly—unlike our neighbors who used a cheaper crew and now have drainage issues. Worth every penny.

Lisa R. Swimming Pool Removal
“

Demolished our aging Montrose retail space in 3 days with zero disruption to adjacent businesses. Their dust control system was impressive—customers next door never knew we were working. Will use them for our next Houston project.

Carlos M. Commercial Demolition
“

Gutted our River Oaks condo for a full remodel. Horizon protected the original brick walls and hardwood subfloors we wanted to keep. Their crew cleaned up daily—no construction debris in common areas.

Danielle K. Interior Demolition
“

When our restaurant's roof collapsed after heavy rains, Horizon had the site secured and demolished within 12 hours. Their insurance documentation helped speed up our claim. Lifesavers.

Marcus W. Emergency Demolition
“

Removed 1,200 sq ft of failing driveway in The Woodlands without damaging any of our live oaks. They recycled all the concrete and even matched the soil grade to our landscaping. Textbook execution.

Sarah L. Concrete Removal

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a typical Houston home demolition take?
Most 2,000 sq ft homes take 2-3 days. Factors like brick vs. wood construction add variance—we provide exact timelines after site evaluation.
Do you handle homes damaged by flooding?
Yes—we're FEMA-certified for flood-damage demolitions and know Houston's high-water marks. Insurance documentation assistance available.
